_notes: Seed alias file for audit-scenario-coverage.mjs (FB-59 fix).
Keys are '<feature-file>::<Scenario Title>'. Values in `aliases` are
canonical test-name substrings that will be bidirectionally-substring-
matched against the combined backend+frontend test corpus. Use this
when a scenario's prose title legitimately diverges from the test
name (e.g., scenarios worded as HTTP-contract prose map to tests
`ignore` explicitly excludes scenarios that are spec-only (prose or
aspirational). Each entry MUST carry a justification in `_ignore_reasons`.
Reviewers should challenge the ignore-list size on every visit; the
default expectation is an empty list.

review-ui-feedback.feature::GET /api/fee: returns all feedback items for a stage
review-ui-feedback.feature::PUT /api/fee: PUT returns 404 for nonexistent feedback id
PUT returns 400 for no updatable fields
review-ui-feedback.feature::GET /api/fee: returns empty for status=closed when none exist
review-ui-feedback.feature::Reviewer clo: human can close human-authored feedback via PUT
